title: Babcock Ranch: Solar-Powered Town, Eco-Tours & Pure Florida Magic
excerpt: Discover Babcock Ranch — America's first solar-powered town — with wildlife eco-tours, lakeside dining, and wide-open Florida wilderness just a short drive from Fort Myers.
